symptoms.symptom_name: Recurrent orthostatic syncope (two collapses today on standing)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Syncope indicates exhausted cardiovascular compensation to a severe oxygen-carrying deficit — a decompensation red flag.
Recurrent syncope with palpitations mandates ECG to exclude arrhythmia/structural cause before attributing solely to anaemia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Reflex tachycardia and exertional dyspnoea / palpitations on standing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hyperdynamic high-output compensation for reduced oxygen-carrying capacity.

symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive fatigue and reduced exercise tolerance over 6 months

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Insidious anaemia symptom; non-specific alone but fits a chronic iron-loss course.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pagophagia (compulsive craving and chewing of ice)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pagophagia is a specific behavioural marker of iron deficiency that often resolves with repletion.
Chronic menorrhagia is the leading cause of iron deficiency anaemia in premenopausal women — identifies the blood-loss source.

symptoms.symptom_name: Koilonychia, atrophic glossitis and angular cheilitis (patient-visible on camera; clinician-confirmed on exam)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Epithelial stigmata of chronic iron deficiency; the patient may glimpse the appearance on camera but clinician examination confirms them.
Restless legs syndrome is associated with low iron stores; non-specific supporting feature.

symptoms.symptom_name: Orthostatic blood-pressure drop (supine 105/65 to standing 85/50) with HR 115

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective postural hypotension with reflex tachycardia confirms haemodynamic decompensation — a sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers circulatory compromise from recurrent syncope, not a measured BP.

symptoms.symptom_name: Conjunctival/mucosal and palmar-crease pallor with capillary refill 3 seconds and a systolic flow murmur

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pallor and a high-output flow murmur are clinician examination findings of severe anaemia — not obtainable by the AI remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Full blood examination and iron studies (microcytic hypochromic anaemia, low ferritin)

investigation_details.investigation_name: Full blood examination + ferritin + iron studies
investigation_details.expected_result: Microcytic, hypochromic anaemia with critically low serum ferritin
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Severity and cause of the anaemia remain unconfirmed; treatment cannot be safely targeted.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Microcytic hypochromic indices with a low ferritin are the defining laboratory signature — never obtainable in telehealth in real time.
Absence of black stools or vomited blood makes an acute upper GI bleed a less likely source, though it does not formally exclude occult GI loss.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Symptomatic severe anaemia with haemodynamic compromise
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Recurrent syncope + reflex tachycardia + postural hypotension + flow murmur mark decompensation demanding same-day acute assessment, independent of the underlying cause.
Pagophagia, menorrhagia source, koilonychia/glossitis and restless legs together point specifically to iron deficiency as the cause.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full blood examination, ferritin and iron studies
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and grades the anaemia and its iron-deficiency cause; part of the same-day acute work-up, not a telehealth-obtainable result.
Recurrent syncope with palpitations requires exclusion of a primary cardiac cause and assessment for demand ischaemia.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Pelvic assessment for menorrhagia (in-person gynaecology work-up)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Identify and manage the chronic blood-loss source once the patient is stabilised.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home self-diagnosis of anaemia by the AI without bloods
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI cannot obtain an FBE/ferritin remotely and must not declare the anaemia confirmed or graded from history and video alone.
